docs.title: Machine Learning Notes
docs.text:
Welcome! 👋

This website contains my personal notes, explanations, mathematical derivations, code examples, and learning resources related to Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Artificial Intelligence.

The goal of this project is to build a structured knowledge base that helps me revise concepts quickly while also serving as a public resource for anyone interested in ML.

docs.title: What is a Perceptron?
docs.text: A perceptron is the simplest artificial neuron used for binary classification.

docs.title: Intuition
docs.text:
Imagine you want to decide whether an email is spam.

The perceptron looks at different features of the email and combines them using weights.

If the final score is greater than a threshold, it predicts Spam.

Otherwise it predicts Not Spam.
